creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text: I have been running 13.0-STABLE on this machine since 8 Feb 2021 and upgrading once or twice a week without issues. The machine was running production code: firewall (PF + IPFW with dummynet), HTTP proxy, some VPN solutions etc. and never experienced panics there. Like I have mentioned above, the last non-panicking build was stable/13-n244798-05083436a6e from Sun Mar 7.
